outlook_cert_pem.label: Azure app certificate PEM contents (cert + private key; alternative to client secret)

outlook_cert_password.label: Passphrase for the certificate PEM (leave empty if unencrypted)

allowed_senders.label: Allowed senders (comma-separated; supports glob wildcards e.g. *@mycompany.com; empty blocks all)

poll_top.label: Max unread messages fetched per poll (<=50)

restrict_read_to_allowed_senders.label: Prevent agent from reading messages from untrusted senders
restrict_read_to_allowed_senders.description: When enabled (recommended), the read tools (outlook_get_message / outlook_search_messages / outlook_get_new_messages) only surface mail from senders on allowed_senders. Warning: disabling may lead to security risk! (the agent could read any message in the mailbox, including spoofed or non-allow-listed mail)
